manifest.goal: Continue the fixed main-process/child-process loop from the latest isolated service-readout evidence: execute prepare_project_status_continuation after run_context_work_packages, create the next bounded Context Pack from PROJECT_STATUS/global goals, run the resulting work package(s), and keep advancing until no PROJECT_STATUS.next_step, next_work_packages, pending global goals, workbench next_action_readout, or continuation-ready projection remains. Preserve service isolation, projected_action_progress, agent lifecycle fact recording for spawned child processes, cleanup execution, process-hardening evidence, browser/closeout validation, and durable workbench projection updates.

non_goals: Do not modify managed business projects unless the task is an explicit integration adapter.
Do not treat a completed cycle summary as a stopping condition.
Do not rely on chat history as the only durable state.
forbidden_actions: Do not stop while next_step or next_work_packages are available and no human blocker exists.
Do not write platform-core code into managed business projects.
Do not skip main-process evaluation gates.
rollback_conditions: work package writes outside owned files
